Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface Users.UserStatusParams

Enclosing interface:
Users
public static interface Users.UserStatusParams

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Users.UserStatusParams
    withGameIds()
     
    Users.UserStatusParams
    withGameIds(boolean withGameIds)
    Whether or not to include game IDs in the result
    default Users.UserStatusParams
    withGameMetas()
     
    Users.UserStatusParams
    withGameMetas(boolean withGameMetas)
    Also return the id, time control and variant of the game being played, if any, for each player, in a playing field.
    Defaults to false to preserve server resources.
    Disables withGameIds
    default Users.UserStatusParams
    withSignal()
     
    Users.UserStatusParams
    withSignal(boolean withSignal)
    Also return the network signal of the player, when available.

  • Method Details

    • withGameIds

      Users.UserStatusParams withGameIds(boolean withGameIds)
      Whether or not to include game IDs in the result

    • withGameIds

      default Users.UserStatusParams withGameIds()

    • withSignal

      Users.UserStatusParams withSignal(boolean withSignal)
      Also return the network signal of the player, when available. It ranges from 1 (poor connection, lag > 500ms) to 4 (great connection, lag < 150ms) Defaults to `false` to preserve server resources.

    • withSignal

      default Users.UserStatusParams withSignal()

    • withGameMetas

      Users.UserStatusParams withGameMetas(boolean withGameMetas)
      Also return the id, time control and variant of the game being played, if any, for each player, in a playing field.
      Defaults to false to preserve server resources.
      Disables withGameIds

    • withGameMetas

      default Users.UserStatusParams withGameMetas()
